children.heading: Eligible orchardist
children.label: 1 Eligible orchardist
children.text: The term “eligible orchardist” means a person that produces annual crops from trees for commercial purposes.

children.heading: Natural disaster
children.label: 2 Natural disaster
children.text: The term “natural disaster” means plant disease, insect infestation, drought, fire, freeze, flood, earthquake, lightning, and other occurrence, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Tree
children.label: 4 Tree
children.text: The term “tree” includes a tree, bush, and vine.
